lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, a snake charmer! Can I have a go? Can I have a go? Please?

sections.title: Using a coin on the money pot

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, a snake charmer! Can I have a go? Can I have a go? Please?

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: If it means that you'll leave me alone, I will happily give you my snake charming super starter kit, complete with flute and basket. But you're clearly over burdened as it is.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Ah, I see you've lost your basket. Here you are, now leave me alone! You're ruining the show.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: Ah, I see you've lost your snake charming flute. Here you go, now leave me alone! You're distracting my punters... er, I mean, crowd.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: If you're that desperate to try, have my patented snake charming starter kit. It comes with a special snake charming flute and a basket to keep your charmed snakes in. Now, leave me alone!

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: I'm not stopping you! You have your own snake charming flute.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to talk to you about animal charming.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost some of the gear you gave me.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: There you go. Now if you don't mind I'm busy trying to charm this here snake.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you teach me any more about animal charming.

lines.speaker: Ali the Snake Charmer
lines.text: No, I doubt it. I believe your talents lie in other areas.
